title: rubus polymorphus
intro: Rubus polymorphus, also known as the Blackberry Bramble or Black Raspberry Bramble, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to eastern Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to have various medicinal applications. The health benefits of Rubus polymorphus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other food products.
